name: openblock
description: Block Blast — 网页方块消除游戏，经 Flask 将会话与统计持久化到 SQLite

scripts.dev:80: npm run predev && sudo -E env PATH="$PATH" VITE_PORT=80 ./node_modules/.bin/vite
scripts.server:rl: env RL_CHECKPOINT_SAVE=rl_checkpoints/bb_policy.pt RL_TRAINING_LOG=rl_checkpoints/training.jsonl RL_SAVE_EVERY=500 RL_DEVICE=auto RL_AUTOLOAD=1 RL_LR=1e-3 RL_GAMMA=0.99 RL_VALUE_COEF=0.25 RL_VALUE_HUBER_BETA=10 RL_ENTROPY_COEF=0.01 RL_ENTROPY_COEF_MIN=0.004 RL_ENTROPY_DECAY_EPISODES=12000 RL_RETURN_SCALE=0.1 RL_ADV_NORM=1 RL_ADV_MIN_STD=1e-4 RL_GRAD_CLIP=1.0 RL_CURRICULUM=1 python3 server.py
